driver_subject: dma-buf: move dma-buf symbols into the DMA_BUF module namespace
kernel_subject: module: add support for symbol namespaces.
stage1_reason: Driver added MODULE_IMPORT_NS(DMA_BUF) to comply with kernel namespace changes for dma-buf symbols as described in the commit that moved dma-buf symbols into DMA_BUF module namespace
stage2_reason: Driver commit adds MODULE_IMPORT_NS(DMA_BUF) to comply with kernel's new symbol namespace mechanism introduced by 8651ec01daed, which added MODULE_IMPORT_NS support.
